requirement_topic.en: Energy Efficiency — Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for Refrigerating Appliances
requirement_topic.zh: 能源效率——制冷器具最低能效标准（MEPS）
requirement_topic.zht: 能源效率——製冷器具最低能效標準（MEPS）

summary.en: Refrigerating appliances entering the Nigerian market are subject to Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS). Nigeria has, with support from the Economic Community of West African States (ECOWAS) energy-efficiency programme and the Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN), adopted MEPS and labelling requirements for household refrigerators and freezers based on energy consumption performance. Appliances must meet a minimum energy-efficiency threshold and demonstrate energy consumption (kWh/year) and energy-efficiency class through testing to the adopted NIS test method (derived from IEC 62552, household refrigerating appliances — characteristics and test methods). Energy performance evidence is presented within the SONCAP conformity package supporting the SON Product Certificate. Appliances that fall below the MEPS threshold may be refused certification and import clearance.
summary.zh: 进入尼日利亚市场的制冷器具须符合最低能效标准（MEPS）。尼日利亚在西非国家经济共同体（ECOWAS）能效计划及尼日利亚能源委员会（ECN）的支持下，已基于能耗性能对家用电冰箱和冷冻箱采纳MEPS及标签要求。器具须达到最低能效门槛，并通过按所采纳的NIS测试方法（源自IEC 62552，家用制冷器具——特性和测试方法）的测试，证明其能耗（千瓦时/年）及能效等级。能源性能证据须在支撑SON产品证书的SONCAP符合性资料内提交。低于MEPS门槛的器具可能被拒绝认证及清关。
summary.zht: 進入奈及利亞市場的製冷器具須符合最低能效標準（MEPS）。奈及利亞在西非國家經濟共同體（ECOWAS）能效計畫及奈及利亞能源委員會（ECN）的支持下，已基於能耗性能對家用電冰箱和冷凍箱採納MEPS及標籤要求。器具須達到最低能效門檻，並通過按所採納的NIS測試方法（源自IEC 62552，家用製冷器具——特性和測試方法）的測試，證明其能耗（千瓦時/年）及能效等級。能源性能證據須在支撐SON產品證書的SONCAP符合性資料內提交。低於MEPS門檻的器具可能被拒絕認證及清關。

standards_or_laws: Nigeria Minimum Energy Performance Standards (MEPS) for refrigerating appliances — Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN) / SON
NIS test method derived from IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods
ECOWAS Regional Energy Efficiency Standards and Labelling programme (regional basis for Nigerian MEPS)

summary.en: China sets minimum energy performance and grading for household refrigerating appliances through GB 12021.2 (the minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators), enforced via the China Energy Label scheme administered by the China Energy Label Center (CELC) under SAMR. GB 12021.2 defines energy-efficiency grades and minimum allowable energy-consumption values, tested under the GB test method (aligned with IEC 62552). A China Energy Label (a tiered grade label) is mandatory on refrigerators sold domestically. While the underlying test physics (IEC 62552) overlaps with Nigeria's adopted method, the Chinese grade boundaries, allowable values, and label format are China-specific and the China Energy Label is not recognised by SON for the Nigerian market.
summary.zh: 中国通过GB 12021.2（家用电冰箱耗电量限定值及能效等级）设定家用制冷器具的最低能效与分级，并通过由市场监管总局（SAMR）下属中国能效标识中心（CELC）管理的中国能效标识制度执行。GB 12021.2规定能效等级及最低允许能耗值，按GB测试方法（与IEC 62552一致）测试。国内销售的冰箱须强制加贴中国能效标识（分级标签）。尽管底层测试原理（IEC 62552）与尼日利亚所采纳的方法重叠，但中国的等级界限、允许值及标签格式为中国专属，且中国能效标识不被SON认可用于尼日利亚市场。
summary.zht: 中國通過GB 12021.2（家用電冰箱耗電量限定值及能效等級）設定家用製冷器具的最低能效與分級，並通過由市場監管總局（SAMR）下屬中國能效標識中心（CELC）管理的中國能效標識制度執行。GB 12021.2規定能效等級及最低允許能耗值，按GB測試方法（與IEC 62552一致）測試。國內銷售的冰箱須強制加貼中國能效標識（分級標籤）。儘管底層測試原理（IEC 62552）與奈及利亞所採納的方法重疊，但中國的等級界限、允許值及標籤格式為中國專屬，且中國能效標識不被SON認可用於奈及利亞市場。

standards_or_laws: GB 12021.2 — Minimum allowable values of energy efficiency and energy efficiency grades for household refrigerators (mandatory China Energy Label scheme)
China Energy Label scheme — administered by CELC under SAMR
GB test method aligned with IEC 62552 — Household refrigerating appliances — Characteristics and test methods

gap.en: Although both China's GB 12021.2 and Nigeria's MEPS rest on IEC 62552 test physics, the threshold values, grade boundaries, and acceptance are different and independent. Exporters must: (1) confirm the appliance meets the Nigerian MEPS minimum energy-efficiency threshold for its category, not merely a Chinese grade; (2) obtain an energy-consumption (kWh/year) test report from a laboratory accepted by the SONCAP certification body, using the NIS/IEC 62552 method; (3) note that the Chinese GB 12021.2 grade and China Energy Label do not transfer to Nigeria and the China Energy Label must not be displayed as the Nigerian compliance mark; (4) verify the current Nigerian MEPS threshold and category definitions before submission, as these values are periodically revised. Models that pass China's MEPS may still fail Nigeria's threshold if the threshold is set differently.
gap.zh: 尽管中国GB 12021.2与尼日利亚MEPS均基于IEC 62552测试原理，但门槛值、等级界限及接受标准各不相同且相互独立。出口商须：（1）确认器具符合其类别的尼日利亚MEPS最低能效门槛，而不仅是中国等级；（2）按NIS/IEC 62552方法，取得由SONCAP认证机构接受的实验室出具的能耗（千瓦时/年）检测报告；（3）注意中国GB 12021.2等级及中国能效标识不适用于尼日利亚，且中国能效标识不得作为尼日利亚合规标志展示；（4）提交前核实现行尼日利亚MEPS门槛及类别定义，因该等数值会定期修订。通过中国MEPS的型号若门槛设定不同仍可能未达尼日利亚门槛。
gap.zht: 儘管中國GB 12021.2與奈及利亞MEPS均基於IEC 62552測試原理，但門檻值、等級界限及接受標準各不相同且相互獨立。出口商須：（1）確認器具符合其類別的奈及利亞MEPS最低能效門檻，而不僅是中國等級；（2）按NIS/IEC 62552方法，取得由SONCAP認證機構接受的實驗室出具的能耗（千瓦時/年）檢測報告；（3）注意中國GB 12021.2等級及中國能效標識不適用於奈及利亞，且中國能效標識不得作為奈及利亞合規標誌展示；（4）提交前核實現行奈及利亞MEPS門檻及類別定義，因該等數值會定期修訂。通過中國MEPS的型號若門檻設定不同仍可能未達奈及利亞門檻。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — refrigerating appliances must meet Nigerian MEPS and present energy-performance evidence within SONCAP; sub-threshold appliances may be refused certification and clearance
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — GB 12021.2 minimum allowable values and China Energy Label required for domestic sale; administered by CELC under SAMR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Refrigerating appliances must meet Nigerian MEPS, with energy-consumption evidence (NIS/IEC 62552) presented inside the SONCAP package. China's GB 12021.2 grade and China Energy Label do not transfer to Nigeria. Exporters should confirm the current Nigerian MEPS threshold for the product category before submission, since a model passing in China may not meet a differently set Nigerian threshold.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 制冷器具须符合尼日利亚MEPS，并在SONCAP资料内提交能耗证据（NIS/IEC 62552）。中国GB 12021.2等级及中国能效标识不适用于尼日利亚。出口商应在提交前核实该产品类别的现行尼日利亚MEPS门槛，因为在中国通过的型号未必符合设定不同的尼日利亚门槛。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 製冷器具須符合奈及利亞MEPS，並在SONCAP資料內提交能耗證據（NIS/IEC 62552）。中國GB 12021.2等級及中國能效標識不適用於奈及利亞。出口商應在提交前核實該產品類別的現行奈及利亞MEPS門檻，因為在中國通過的型號未必符合設定不同的奈及利亞門檻。

requirement_topic.en: Energy Labelling — Mandatory Energy-Efficiency Label for Refrigerators
requirement_topic.zh: 能效标签——冰箱强制能效标签
requirement_topic.zht: 能效標籤——冰箱強制能效標籤

summary.en: In addition to meeting MEPS, refrigerating appliances sold in Nigeria are required to carry a Nigerian energy-efficiency label displaying the energy-efficiency class and annual energy consumption (kWh/year), so consumers can compare products. The label scheme is operated under the Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN) with SON, aligned with the ECOWAS regional labelling framework. The label must be in English, follow the prescribed Nigerian label layout and rating scale, and the declared values must correspond to the energy test report submitted within the SONCAP package. The label is affixed to the appliance and/or shown at point of sale. Mislabelling or display of a foreign (for example Chinese) energy label as the Nigerian mark is not permitted.
summary.zh: 除符合MEPS外，在尼日利亚销售的制冷器具须加贴尼日利亚能效标签，标示能效等级及年能耗（千瓦时/年），以便消费者比较产品。该标签制度由尼日利亚能源委员会（ECN）会同SON运行，与ECOWAS区域标签框架一致。标签须为英文，遵循规定的尼日利亚标签版式及评级刻度，且所声明的数值须与SONCAP资料内提交的能源检测报告对应。标签须加贴于器具及/或在销售点展示。不得错误标注或将外国（如中国）能效标签作为尼日利亚标志展示。
summary.zht: 除符合MEPS外，在奈及利亞銷售的製冷器具須加貼奈及利亞能效標籤，標示能效等級及年能耗（千瓦時/年），以便消費者比較產品。該標籤制度由奈及利亞能源委員會（ECN）會同SON運行，與ECOWAS區域標籤框架一致。標籤須為英文，遵循規定的奈及利亞標籤版式及評級刻度，且所聲明的數值須與SONCAP資料內提交的能源檢測報告對應。標籤須加貼於器具及/或在銷售點展示。不得錯誤標註或將外國（如中國）能效標籤作為奈及利亞標誌展示。

standards_or_laws: Nigeria energy-efficiency labelling requirement for refrigerating appliances — Energy Commission of Nigeria (ECN) / SON
ECOWAS Regional Energy Efficiency Standards and Labelling programme (regional label framework)
NIS test method derived from IEC 62552 — basis for declared energy-consumption values on the label

summary.en: China's equivalent is the mandatory China Energy Label (中国能效标识) under the energy-efficiency labelling regulations administered by CELC/SAMR, with the grade and allowable values set by GB 12021.2. The Chinese label is a coloured tiered-grade label in Chinese, displaying the energy-efficiency grade, annual energy consumption, and the product registration record number in the China Energy Label database. It is mandatory for refrigerators sold in China. The Chinese label format, language, rating scale, and registration database are China-specific and are not recognised in Nigeria; a separate Nigerian label and declaration are required.
summary.zh: 中国对应制度为由CELC/SAMR管理的能效标识法规下的强制性中国能效标识，等级及允许值由GB 12021.2设定。中国标签为中文彩色分级标签，标示能效等级、年能耗及在中国能效标识数据库中的产品备案号。在中国销售的冰箱须强制加贴。中国标签的格式、语言、评级刻度及备案数据库均为中国专属，不被尼日利亚认可；须另行使用尼日利亚标签并作出声明。
summary.zht: 中國對應制度為由CELC/SAMR管理的能效標識法規下的強制性中國能效標識，等級及允許值由GB 12021.2設定。中國標籤為中文彩色分級標籤，標示能效等級、年能耗及在中國能效標識數據庫中的產品備案號。在中國銷售的冰箱須強制加貼。中國標籤的格式、語言、評級刻度及備案數據庫均為中國專屬，不被奈及利亞認可；須另行使用奈及利亞標籤並作出聲明。

standards_or_laws: China Energy Label (中国能效标识) — mandatory energy-efficiency label administered by CELC under SAMR
GB 12021.2 — grades and allowable values underlying the China Energy Label for refrigerators
China Energy Label registration database — product record number shown on the Chinese label

gap.en: Exporters must produce a Nigeria-specific energy label rather than reusing the China Energy Label: (1) the label must be in English, follow the prescribed Nigerian layout and rating scale, and show the energy-efficiency class and annual energy consumption (kWh/year) derived from the NIS/IEC 62552 test; (2) the declared values must match the energy report submitted for SONCAP; (3) the Chinese label (Chinese language, China grade scale, China registration number) must be removed or not presented as the Nigerian compliance label; (4) where labels are printed at the factory in China, the production line must apply the correct Nigeria-market label SKU to Nigeria-bound units. Practical risk: shipping units that still carry only the Chinese label, or that declare a Chinese grade not matching the Nigerian rating, can lead to SONCAP non-conformity and clearance delays at Lagos or Onne.
gap.zh: 出口商须制作尼日利亚专属能效标签，而非沿用中国能效标识：（1）标签须为英文，遵循规定的尼日利亚版式及评级刻度，并标示源自NIS/IEC 62552测试的能效等级及年能耗（千瓦时/年）；（2）所声明的数值须与为SONCAP提交的能源报告一致；（3）中国标签（中文、中国等级刻度、中国备案号）须移除或不得作为尼日利亚合规标签展示；（4）凡标签于中国工厂印制者，产线须对销往尼日利亚的产品贴附正确的尼日利亚市场标签SKU。实务风险：发运仍仅带中国标签、或所声明中国等级与尼日利亚评级不符的产品，可能导致SONCAP不符合并在拉各斯或奥内清关延误。
gap.zht: 出口商須製作奈及利亞專屬能效標籤，而非沿用中國能效標識：（1）標籤須為英文，遵循規定的奈及利亞版式及評級刻度，並標示源自NIS/IEC 62552測試的能效等級及年能耗（千瓦時/年）；（2）所聲明的數值須與為SONCAP提交的能源報告一致；（3）中國標籤（中文、中國等級刻度、中國備案號）須移除或不得作為奈及利亞合規標籤展示；（4）凡標籤於中國工廠印製者，產線須對銷往奈及利亞的產品貼附正確的奈及利亞市場標籤SKU。實務風險：發運仍僅帶中國標籤、或所聲明中國等級與奈及利亞評級不符的產品，可能導致SONCAP不符合並在拉各斯或奧內清關延誤。

mandatory_status.target: Mandatory — Nigerian energy-efficiency label required on refrigerating appliances; declared values must match the SONCAP energy test report; foreign labels not accepted as the Nigerian mark
mandatory_status.cn: Mandatory — China Energy Label required on refrigerators for domestic sale; administered by CELC under SAMR

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] A Nigeria-specific, English-language energy-efficiency label is mandatory for refrigerators, with values matching the SONCAP energy test report. The China Energy Label does not transfer and must not be presented as the Nigerian mark. Exporters should ensure Nigeria-bound units carry the correct Nigerian label SKU off the production line to avoid SONCAP non-conformity and port delays.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 冰箱须强制加贴尼日利亚专属的英文能效标签，其数值须与SONCAP能源检测报告一致。中国能效标识不适用，且不得作为尼日利亚标志展示。出口商应确保销往尼日利亚的产品在产线上贴附正确的尼日利亚标签SKU，以避免SONCAP不符合及港口延误。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 冰箱須強制加貼奈及利亞專屬的英文能效標籤，其數值須與SONCAP能源檢測報告一致。中國能效標識不適用，且不得作為奈及利亞標誌展示。出口商應確保銷往奈及利亞的產品在產線上貼附正確的奈及利亞標籤SKU，以避免SONCAP不符合及港口延誤。
